goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The management milestone is proven. The old integrated spec needs exact Quantity/Unit/Location roles and exact Manage locations/create-form semantics; no other getByLabel collision is evidenced.

worker_package.objective: Harden only the three add controls and Manage locations/create-form selectors in the old integrated spec, then run integrated and disposable-DB gates.
verify: Require old-spec source/mirror pre-hash 1F839D4FF294C999458C307F8560674DC30B5F58EE24BEF7FF1409F46AD0EAC4 and preserve management component/spec hashes.
Replace Quantity with exact spinbutton, Unit/Location with exact comboboxes; preserve actions.
Use exact Manage locations summary/disclosure counts and create form containing exact Add location button; exact Name textbox/Storage type combobox/button, preserving keyboard open and values.
Preserve every other locator/request/mutation/assertion/fixture/screenshot/axe/intentional batch choice/180s timeout; run scoped format/lint and mirror hash.
Run fresh integrated 400/350/50/provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history/two axe/five screenshots/responsive/no errors.
Release port, disposable migrate/dbcheck, final diff/status/hash integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any change beyond authorized selectors is required.
Integrated flow fails twice or selector semantics weaken.

evidence: Old workflow failed before mutation at Quantity/Original quantity.
Unit and Location have the same current substring conflicts.
Nested location management requires exact summary and Add location form containment.

parallel_safety.rationale: One integrated mirror/DB/artifact/port lifecycle must be serial.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
